items.name: Gold Beanie
items.description: Elevate your Roblox avatar’s style with the Black and Gold Lamborghini Beanie. This chic accessory combines a classic black knit design with opulent gold detailing, including the unmistakable Lamborghini emblem, offering a perfect blend of luxury and urban flair to make a striking statement in the virtual world.
